title: ollama/ollama
summary: The official Ollama project that lets you run Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally with a simple CLI and REST API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama, enabling easy integration of local LLMs into Python applications.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama, supporting both Node.js and browser environments.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama, allowing use of local Ollama models within LangChain chains and agents.

title: ollama-webui
summary: A beautiful, feature-rich web interface for Ollama with chat UI, model management, and multi-user support.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust client library for Ollama, providing async/sync APIs and strong typing for integrating Ollama into Rust projects.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java SDK for Ollama, offering simple integration of local LLMs into Java and Android applications.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-like VS Code extension powered by Ollama local models for code completion and chat.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that brings Ollama models into Discord servers for chat, image generation, and moderation.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat UI for Ollama, providing a quick way to build custom web apps around local LLMs.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration for Ollama, enabling local models in retrieval-augmented generation pipelines.

title: ollama-cli-chat
summary: Interactive terminal chat client for Ollama with markdown rendering and conversation history.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Cross-platform desktop GUI for Ollama built with Tauri and React, offering model management and chat.

title: ollama-n8n
summary: n8n node for Ollama, allowing no-code automation workflows to use local LLMs for text generation and chat.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG implementation using Ollama for embeddings and generation, with Chroma vector store.

title: ollama-mcp
summary: Model Context Protocol server for Ollama, exposing local models as MCP tools for Claude Desktop and other MCP clients.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack bot integration for Ollama, allowing teams to chat with local LLMs directly from Slack channels.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that integrates Ollama models for AI-assisted note writing, summarization, and brainstorming.

title: ollama-elixir
summary: Elixir client for Ollama with GenServer-based concurrency, built for scalable Phoenix applications.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Official Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and horizontal scaling.
